{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322072443F7C521CC0DDD7418D79B"}"},"total":43990},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7179579110422086457","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太好看了吧[爱慕]简直爱死，表白石头大大。就是不知道是作者写的太牛逼了，还是我脑子不够用，有些时候我会看不懂。这本书真的很好看，里面的副本非常真实，人物有血有肉。副本崇山医院中院长夫人的话真的，令人深思。小说中好多都是现实生活中的影射。[快哭了]副本三口之家真的震撼到我了。我以前一直以为拐卖是旧时代的，没想到离我们那么近。真的哭死。[快哭了]不过最近我意难平的还是瓦棚篇。陈泽宇真的，我哭死。[哭][哭]“真正的英雄是人民。”“永不妥协。”我感觉瓦棚精神真的会影响我一生的。[快哭了]这本书最大的特点就是打碎我的三观，然后再建立一个更加健全的三观。这本书里面有很多NPC的诡辩，其中瓦盆中学中的陈泽宇的诡辩令我印象最深。有兴趣的可以看一下。呜呜呜呜呜呜呜呜[哭]真的巨爱这本书。[快哭了][快哭了]我长这么大，第1次看那么好看的小说。作者的功底太好了。呜呜呜呜呜呜呜[快哭了]感谢石头大大，祝大大早日住进新房。希望能出版实体书，并且大卖特卖。[飞吻][飞吻][飞吻]（第1次写书评。写得不好，请见谅）","text_exts":[{"e":180,"s":177,"text":"意难平","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%84%8F%E9%9A%BE%E5%B9%B3&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741354837418D79B%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227179579110422086457%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227113743406903331881%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%84%8F%E9%9A%BE%E5%B9%B3%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1671626112,"group_id":"7113743406903331881","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2yJUlUrHk2W3SNwrbGJH9D8FdXvV+RkWwtJxSvX596J","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8b5bf7443451411cb53bb25cee0cbc9d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707040&x-signature=LHVFrCh2Y0WYTkSKxxiQQNGMSkM%3D","user_id":"1561726513589015","user_name":"不会做英语的白痴"},"expand_extra":{},"us t":"5.6369294e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322072443F7C521CC0DDD7418D79B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读53小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":355,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":132665,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":189034,"reply_count":15,"show_pv":286165},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7168657489931109155","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"是我感觉的番茄top1，，我每次没书看了第一选择就是看这本有没有更新或者是我从头再开始看😭真的很精彩，主角是顾毅，但是无论是哪个人物都是饱满的，作者塑造的人设很立体不单一，从一些刻画的细节种种都可以看出人设的特点，感觉很鲜活看这本小说可以脑补出一部电视剧。我最喜欢的人物是孟想和郗望啊啊啊孟想亦正亦邪有点痞气但是自恋喜欢孔雀开屏的高智商心理医生人设不要太爱啊啊啊，我目前比较支持他就是暗月这种说法🤤郗望假小子但是内心还留有女性特有的那一面，有能力，正义而有原则，平时看上去不着调但是对待民众温柔又细腻😭😭好爱姐姐，，而且我感觉他们两个很好磕妈呀，，，不知道我有没有幸磕到真的求石头大大成全🥺我祝你梦中情房大降价早日抱得美人归🥺","text_exts":[{"e":169,"s":166,"text":"高智商","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%AB%98%E6%99%BA%E5%95%86&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741354837418D79B%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227168657489931109155%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227113743406903331881%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%AB%98%E6%99%BA%E5%95%86%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":206,"s":203,"text":"假小子","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%81%87%E5%B0%8F%E5%AD%90&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741354837418D79B%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227168657489931109155%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227113743406903331881%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%81%8
